title: Khawzawl District hnuaia Elementary School-te tan Zirlaibu a thlawna semchhuah a ni
content:
4967/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 23rd March, 2026: Tukin zing dar 7:00 khan School Education Complex BRC Office kawt, Khawzawlah Khawzawl District hnuaia Elementary School-te tan Zirlaibu a thlawna semchhuahna hun chu Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana’n a vailiam.

Inkhawm tawi neih niin Pu Francis Lalruattluanga, Sub-Divisional Education Officer, Dy. District Project Co-Ordinator Samagra Shiksha chuan a kaihruai a, Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan thu sawiin, Sawrkar hmalakna Zirlai bu a thlawna sem theih a ni chu lawmawm a tih baka District DEO leh a thawhpuite hmalak chakna azara a pe chhuak hma thei district an ni chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, Naupang harsa zawkten zirna tha leh hmakhaw eng tak an neih phah ngei theih nan a duhsak thu sawiin motor kal chhuakte a vailiam a ni. Pu PC. Lallawma, Dy. District Project Co-Ordinator chuan lawmthu sawiin he hun hi a khar a ni.

Khawzawl District hnuaiah hian  School hi cluster 7 a then niin, Khawzawl A – 3, Khawzawl B– 4, Khawhai -5, Sialhawk – 5, Rabung – 6, Puilo -3 leh Kawlkulh -3 niin a vai hian Primary School 40 leh Middle School 36 a awm a ni.

Attachment

title: Khawzawlah Outreach Programme for Legal Awareness Campaign neih a ni
content:
4966/2025-2026

Dated Khawzawl, 23rd March, 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 10 khan Zaingen Branch YMA hall, Khawzawlah District Legal Services Authority, Champhai leh District Child Protection Office-te bultumin Outreach Programme for Legal Awareness Campaign neih a ni a, Khawzawl Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana’n a hmanpui a, Resource Person atan Pu Vanlalruata, MJS, Principal Magistrate, JJB&JMFC, District Court, Champhai Judicial District chu hman a ni.

He campaign hun hi Pu James Lalthangmawia, DCPO, Khawzawlin a kaihruai a, Bawrhsap, Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan Legal Awareness programme buatsaih a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, he hun hi a pawimawh em avangin rilru leh ngaihtuahna zawng zawng senga hmang turin kalkhawmte a sawm a. Khawtlanga kan chenhona kawngah dan hriat a tul a, dan hriatloh hi chhuanlam a tlinloh thu leh dan kan neih te hre zau zel tura inzir a tulzia thute, naupang leh hmeichhiate chunga hleilenna chungchangah dan ang taka hma lak thin a tul thute a sawi a, awlsam taka inngaihdam leh mai hi thil tha ber a nih loh thu leh dan kan hriat ang te a taka nunpui a tul bakah midang te zirtir ve zel tul a tih thu a sawi bawk a ni. Naupang leh tleirawlte laka hleilenna te hi social media a thehdarh a thatloh zia sawiin, nupui/pasal zawnna leh eizawnna thlenga nghawng nei thei a nih avangin social media a thehdarh hi dan kalh a nih thu a sawi. District Legal Services Authority te leh District Child Protection Unit (DCPU) te’n Khawzawl District tana programme an buatsaih chu District tana hmasawnna a nih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Resource Person, Pu Vanlalruata atangin naupang harsatna tawk, tanpui ngaite dan ang taka tanpui tura hmalak dan tur bakah naupang kum 18 hnuailam dan bawhchhia te chunga hmalak dan tur te a sawi a. District Legal Services Authority chuan district chhunga mi rethei leh harsa zawkte, naupangte leh mi dangte hnenah man nei lova dan ang taka a tanpui thin thu sawiin, an dikna leh an chanvo humhalh sak hi mitin mawhphurhna a nih thu a sawi a, Interaction hlawkthlak tak hman zui nghal a ni. He hunah ah hian dan lekkawh chungchanga mawhphurtu department hrang hrangte an kal a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP IN CHIEF MINISTER CHAWIMAWINA NOPUI DAWNGTU HENRY LALHMINGMUANA CHAWIMAWINA THUZIAK LEH PAWISA FAI HLAN
content:
4965/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 23rd March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 3:00 PM khan DC's Office Chamber Lawngtlai ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Chief Minister Chawimawina Nopui dawngtu Henry Lalhmingmuana chawimawina thuziak leh pawisa fai hlanna a nei.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Lawngtlai District chhungah mirinawm, rinawmna avanga Chief Minister Chawimawina Nopui dawng thei an nei chu chhuanawm a tih thu a sawi a. Henry Lalhmingmuana rinawmna chuan Lawngtlai District mai nilovin, Mizote chhuanawm leh mawi zawngin rampumah a than phah a ti. Bawrhsap chuan Lawngtlai DC Office chuan Henry Lalhmingmuana rinawmna chu a ngaihluin a chhuang takzet a ni, a ti.

Henry Lalhmingmuana chuan DC Office in a beisei leh rinphak lohva chawimawina an hlan chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a, khami tum, a Auto Rickshaw a pawisa an theihnghilh chauh kha nilovin, tumdangah pawh a passenger ten theihnghilh an neihin a theih ang angin a zawnchhuah thin thu a sawi.

Kum kalta 2025 June 19 zan khan Henry Lalhmingmuana hian Bazar Veng Lawngtlai atangin zan dar 9 vel ah Rakhine lam mi, sumdawng chu Hotel Husop, Assam Rifle Camp bul, Lawngtlai-III ah thlahin, a passenger hian pawisa a theihnghilh tih Henry-a hian In a thlen hnua a Lirthei a enfelna ah a hmua, a tuamna Polythene chu a tet vangin pawisa a ni tih a hre nghalin, a neitu a zawng chhuaka, kimtakin a pe let. Hemi tuma pawisa theihnghilh, himtaka peklet hi a vaiin Cheng Nuai 15 leh Sing nga  a ni.

Attachment

title: Excise & Narcotics Department Commissioner endikin Hnahthial District Assistant Commissioner Office-a thawktute tan Annual Inspection nei
content:
4963/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 23rd March, 2026:Vawiin khan Excise & Narcotics Department Commissioner, Pu Z. Lalhmangaiha endikna hnuaiah Hnahthial District Assistant Commissioner Office-a thawktute tan Annual Inspection neih niin mamawh leh duhzawng sawina hun - Durbar chu hman nghal a ni a. He hun hi Hnahthial District Excise and Narcotics Assistant Commissioner, Pu Malsawmdawngzela chuan a kaihruai a ni.

Commissioner chuan Hnahthial District tiamin District thar office tinte chu sawrkar duhsakna zarah Assistant Commissioner awpin a lo awm tak thu a sawi a. Hnahthial District-a an office pawh hian mahni a inrelbawlna hran an neih theih nan tun Financial Year tharah LOC charge an neih hman ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Commissioner chuan transfer and posting chungchang sawiin uluk taka ngaihtuah hnuah department that nan mai bakah transfer turte chhungkaw dinhmun en chunga siam a nih thin thu a sawi a. Awmna hmun hrehawm deuh pawh ni se puitling taka tuar zel tura fuih in "Quantity-ah tam lo mah ila Quality lam ngai pawimawh ila, mahni hna theuh chu hlim tak leh zah taka thawk chungin lungawi tak leh chapo lovin i thawk tlang ang u" tiin Hnahthial District office a thawktute hnenah fuihna thuchah a sawi a ni.

Durbar hunah hian office-a thawktuten an mamawhnate thlenin program chu SI, Pu F. Lalronghaka'n lawmthu sawina nen a khar a ni.

Tun dinhmunah hian Hnahthial District Assistant Commissioner of Excise and Narcotics Office hnuaiah hian thawktu 10 awm mekin Assistant Commissioner hona hnuaiah OC pakhat, SI pakhat Head Constable pakhat, Constable panga leh 4th Grade pakhat an awm mek a. Constable pakhat in a rawn zawm belh thuai tura beisei a ni bawk.

title: Lungleiah Jal Mahotsav kharna leh World Water Day lawmna hun buatsaih a ni
content:
4962/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 23:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Water & Sanitation Mission (DWSM) huaihawtin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah March ni 8–22, 2026 chhunga chawlhkar hnih awh Tui Kut, "Jal Mahotsav" (Water Festival) hman zawh tak kharna hun leh kum tina March ni 22-a hman ṭhin, khawvel pum huapa tui ngaihhlut inzirtir ni, "World Water Day 2026" lawmna hun buatsaih a ni.

He hun hi Lunglei Election Officer Pi Lalhruaitluangi chuan kaihruaiin, tui chu mihringte nun khaw chhuah nana mamawh bulpui pakhat a nih avangin a renchem leh humhalh kawngah mi tinin tha thawh leh ṭan lak a ṭul thu a sawi a. Sawrkar leh department hma lakna chauhva innghat lovin, mi tinin ngaihven a ṭul tih sawiin, tui chungchanga hma lakna chu khua leh tui zawng zawng, a hmei a paa kan mawhphurhna a ni, a ti.

Lunglei DWSM Member Secretary, PHED Lunglei Rural WATSAN Divison-a Sr Executive Engineer Dr ZR Ṭhasangzuala chuan Lunglei District-a Jal Mahotsav kalpui dan report tlangpui a tar lang a. Jal Mahotsav chhung hian Lunglei District chhunga khaw thlan bikahte khawtlang hruaitute leh Village Water & Sanitation Committee (VWSC) member-te nen tui hlutna, tui renchem leh humhalh pawimawhzia inzirtirna leh infuih phurna buatsaih a nih thu te, khaw tina VC leh VWSC te'n an tui lak ṭhat leh ṭhat loh zir chiang a, Jal Seva Ankalan (Water Service Assessment) portal-a an thun thu te a sawi a. Jal Seva Ankalan report aṭang hian thingtlang khuate'n hnianghnar zawka tui an hmuh reng theih nana hma lak dan tur ruahmanna, "District Improvement Plan" duan tur a nih thu a sawi a. Jal Mahotsav 2026-ah hian Lunglei District Belthei khaw tuipu, Pu K. Chondro chuan Mizoram pum huapa tuipu ṭha lawmman, "Outstanding Nal Jal Mitra/Water Operator Award" a dawn thu leh vawiina Aizawla World Water Day hmannaah Award hi hlan a nih thu a tar lang bawk.

District Improvement Plan ruahman dan tur rawtna sawi ho nghal a ni a. Jal Seva Ankalan report aṭanga a lan danin Lunglei District chhunga thingtlang khaw ṭhenkhatah an tui lak hnarah tui hna a tlem tial tial tih tar lan niin, in tina tui la pek kim lohte pawh an awm tih tar lan a ni a. Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM) hnuaia in tina tui pe tura hma lakna (Har Ghar Jal) kalpui laia in dingte chu tui pek kim an nih thu tar lan niin, hetih laia in la awm lote chu scheme a zawh tawh avangin a hranpaa pek theih an nih tawh loh avangin, inkaihhruaina awm sa angin tui connection mamawh belhte chu VWSC-in ruahmanna an siampui a, a senso pawh anmahnia an inngaihtuah a ngaih thu tar lan a ni a. Ramngaw hi tui hna vengtu leh tipungtu bakah, tui tithianghlimtu a nih avangin tui lakna hnara ramngawte humhalh a, ramngaw tihchereu loh bakah, thing phun belh zel tura hma lak a pawimawhzia sawi ho niin, hemi kawngah hian nasa zawka hma lak ni se, tih a ni a. Tui renchem leh ruahtui khawl khawm chungchangah te, department hrang hrang (PHED, RD&A, IWRD, LRS&WC, EF&CC, etc.) te nen thawk hova tui luang ral tur venna ruhrel hrang hrang siam kawngah te awmze nei zawka hma lak dan kawng zawn ni se, tih a ni bawk.

JJM hnuaiah PHED chuan thingtlang khaw hrang hranga an tui tlan a thianghlim leh thianghlim loh an endik ṭhin bakah, khaw tinin anmahnia an endik theihna tur, Field Testing Kit (FTK) pek leh a hman dan zirtir an ni a. JJM sum hmuh a tawp tak avangin leh FTK-a damdawi hman tur inpek chu a thih tawh avangin khaw hrang hrangte tui tlan endik dan turah a remchan danin PHED, RD&A leh VWSC te nen inrawn tlanga ruahmanna siam dan tur ngaihtuah ni se, tih a ni a. Khaw tinin ṭha zawka tui hnar ramngaw an humhalh theih nan DWSM hmingin inzirtirna leh  ngenna lehkha thawn chhuah ni se, tih a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: FAINA HNATLANGPUI NEI DAWN
content:
4961/2025-2026

Aizawl, 23.03.2026:Coordination Committee, Comprehensive Municipal Waste Management, Aizawl leh Central YMA tangkawp chuan City branch YMA huamchhungah March ni 28, 2026 hian Faina Hnatlangpui a huaihawt dawn.

Aizawl khawpuiin faina kawnga nasa zawka hma a lo sawn theih nan leh mipui nawlpui faina kawnga kan lo harh thar zel theih nan he Faina Hnatlangpui hi ruahman a ni a. Faina hnatlangpui bul tanna leh City Branch YMA Fai Intihsiak 2026 khuhhawnna programme chu hemi ni zing dar 7:30 AM hian Vanapa Hall kawtah hman tum a ni.

title: SPECIAL INTENSIVE REVISION OF ELECTORAL ROLL CHUNGCHANGA HRIATTURTE
content:
4960/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 23rdMarch, 2026:Election Commission of India chuan Article 324 of the Constitution of India, Section 21 of the Representation of People Act leh Registration of Elector Rules, 1960 ten thuneihna a pek angin India ram State leh Union Territory zawng zawngah Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of Electoral Roll neih turin thupek a chhuah a.

Phase – 1 ah Bihar State ah SIR hi neih niin Phase-II ah state hrang hrang 12 (sawmpahnih) heng A&NI, Chhattisgarh, Goa, Gujarat, Kerala, Lakshadweep, Madhya Pradesh, Puducherry, Rajasthan, Tamil Nadu, Uttar Pradesh, West Bengal ah te hian neih zawh tawh a ni bawk. Phase – III ah State leh UT dang zawngah April, 2026 atangin neih leh tur a ni.

Special Intensive Revision (SIR) kalpui dan tur tlangpui te:

1. Special Intensive Revision ah chuan Electoral Roll hi a thar hlaka buatsaih tur a ni.

2. Chutihrual chuan tuna Electoral Roll kan hman mek leh kum 2005-a Mizorama Intensive Revision kan neihtuma Electoral Roll behchhan tur a ni ang. Tuna electoral roll hman meka hming chuang ten enumeration form hmangin electoral roll-a ziahluh an dil thei ang a. Enumeration Form thehlut zingah kum 2005 Intensive Revision electoral roll-a hming la chuang lo emaw an detail inmil lo te chuan an nihna tih chianna document an thehluh leh a ngai dawn a ni.

3. Electoral Roll siam thar turah hian Enumeration Form hmangin hming ziah luh dilna thehluh tur a ni a, tuna Electoral Roll kan hman lai meka hming chuang ten Enumeration Form hi thehluh tur a ni.

4. Electoral roll hmanlai meka hming chuang lo te erawh in Form 6 hmangin Electoral roll-a hming ziahluh an dil a ngai ang.

5. Enumeration Form hi BLO/Booth Level Agent (BLA) ten in tinah an sem ang a, dahkhah hnuah BLO ten anla khawm leh ang.

6. Enumeration Form thehlutte chuan an EPIC ngai an ring thei ang a, EPIC thar pek chhuah an ngai lovang. (Hemi chungchangah hian Election Commission of India chuan thuthar a neih leh neih loh ngaihchan a ni)

7. A hun chhunga Enumeration Form thehlut lo erawh chuan Form-6 hmangin Electoral Roll-a hming ziah luhthar an dil a ngai dawn a, EPIC thar pek an ni ang a/ an EPIC number ngai an ring thei lovang.

8. Enumeration Form thehluh rual hian document engmah thil tel a ngai lovang.

9. ERO chuan Enumeration Form thehluttu zawng zawng hming chuanna draft Electoral Roll a buatsaihin a tichhuak ang a, hemi copy hi Electoral Registration Officer (ERO)/Asst. Electoral Registration Officer (AERO) office ah leh District Election Officer/DC office_ah en theihin a awm ang.

10. ERO-in uluk taka Enumeration Form-te a enfiah hnuah Enumeration Form thehlut zingah SIR neih hnuhnung ber Electoral Roll-a an detail (anmahni emaw an chhungte) awmlo emaw inmillo an awm chuan ERO-in notice a pe ang a, ERO hmaah hearing neih tur ni.

11. Hearing-ah mahni nihna (detail) tih chian nan a hnuai ami ang hian document thehluh tur a ni

Ni 01.07.1987 hma lama India-a piang tan

India ram pawn piang tan (Ram pawna India Mission-in Birth Registration a pekchhuah finfiahna thil tur)

Registration/Naturalization hmangin India khua leh tui nihna nei tan. (Certificate ofRegistration of Citizenship thehluh tur)

12. Document thehluh theih te –

title: WORLD WATER DAY 2026 HMAN A NI
content:
4959/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 23rdMarch 2026: Vawiin khanPublic Health Engineering Department leh Central YMA te huaihawtin, khawvel puma tui pawimawhna inzirtirna ni  ‘World Water Day’ chu Dawrpui Multipurpose Hall, Aizawl-ah hman a ni a. PHE Chief Engineer (Headquarters) K. Zohmingliana’n kaihruaiin, PHE department-a thawkte bakah tui hna humhalh kawnga an thawhpui department hrang hrang leh CYMA, MHIP, MSCW leh YMA branch hrang hrang hruaitute an tel bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian PHE Chief Engineer (Zone-I) Er. Ngentluanga’n kumin World Water Day thupui, ‘Water and Gender’ tih hmangin thu a sawi a, tui hnianghnar taka a luanna hmunah chuan intluktlanna a awm thin thu sawiin, tunlai khawvelah mipa leh hmeichhiate intluktlanna thlentu hnar pawimawh tak a nih dan hrang hrangte a sawi bawk. Chief Engineer (Zone-II) Er. Lalropuia pawhin thu sawiin, “Mizoramin fur laiin ruahtui hnianghnar takin (2 - 2.5m) hmu thin mah ila, thalah erawh tui kang avangin kan buai leh fo thin” a ti a, tui renchem nachang leh tui dah khawl nachang hre thar leh theuh turin mipuite a chah bawk.

Central YMA President Pu R. Lalngheta pawhin Mizorama kan lui tui leh tuihnate humhalh a pawimawh takzet thu sawiin “ruihhlo do tluk zetin ngai pawimawh ila, tui hna ti bawrhbangtute chu tu pawh ni se, i do ngam ang u” a ti bawk.

MHIPGeneral Secretary (Hqrs)Prof. Irene Lalruatkimi chuan tui chungchanga hmeichhiate dinhmun UN report tarlangin, khawvel ram pumatui enkawlnaWater PolicylehPlansiamah 71% chu hmeichhiate ban phaka siam a nih tawh thu a sawi a, chutihlai chuan khawvel puma hmeichhia 5% te chauh hipolicyduangtute zingah an la tel thu sawiin kum tinin tui thianghlim lo leh tui harsatna avangin naupang 1000 chuang an boral thin thu a sawi bawk a; khawvel ram puma 14% ramte chuan tui enkawlna kawngah hmeichhiate chanvo pek leh dah pawimawihna an la neih loh thu a sawi bawk.

Vawiina World Water Day hmannaah hian, lui tui leh tui hnate humhalh tura thutiam chham rual niin,tui hna humhalh kawngainelna hrang hranga ti thate hnenah lawmman sem a ni bawk. PHE SE leh CYMA Coordination Committee Secretary ni bawk Er. Lalrinzuala Ralte chuan khaikhawmna thu sawiin hun hi a khar a ni.

United Nations (UN) General Assembly 1992 chuan March ni 22 hi tui pawimawhna inzirtirna ni – World Water Day (WWD) atan a puang a. Kum 1993 atang khan khawvel hmun hrang hrangah hman tan niin Mizoramah chuan kum 2012 atang khan hman tan a ni a, remchan zawkna avangin kumin WWD chu Mizoramah chuan vawiin March ni 23 hian hman a ni. Hemi ni pual hian inelna hrang hrangte buatsaih thin niin, thutiam (pledge) chham rualnate neih thin a ni bawk. UN hian kum tin thupui thlan bik a nei thin a, kumin thupui chu ‘Water and Gender’tih niin, au hla (campaign slogan) chu -Tui hnianghnarna hmunah intluktlanna a awm thin(Where Water Flows, Equality Flows) tih a ni.

March ni 8 - 22, 2026chhung khan tui pawimawhna leh tui hna humhalh tura inzirtirna,Jal Mahotsav (Tui Kut)chu State level (Rajya Jal Utsav/Nadi Utsav) leh Village level (Lok Jal Utsav) ah te hman a lo ni tawh bawk.

Lui leh tuihna humhalh kawnga intihsiakna Category hrang hrang leh lawmman latute:

1. Outstanding contribution under the category “Demonstrating continuous 24 x 7 rural water supply excellence”.

Dawngtu -Pu Zohmingsiama, Chairman VWSC, Sailam, Aizawl District

2. Outstanding contribution under the category “Excellence in Financial Sustainability through Efficient User Charge Collection”

Dawngtu -Pu Laldinthara, Zokhawthar, Champhai District

3. Outstanding contribution under the category “Women Demonstrating Excellence in FTK-Based Water Quality Monitoring”

Dawngtu -Pi Lalnunpuii, Buangpui, Serchhip District

4. Outstanding contribution under the category “Distinguished Sarpanch for Outstanding Leadership in Rural Piped Water Supply Management”

Dawngtu -Pu Zoramchhana, Khualen, Khawzawl District

5. Outstanding contribution under the category “SHG Representative for Exceptional Contribution to Rural Piped Water Supply Management”

Dawngtu -Pi Lalsaichheuvi, Lallen, Mamit District

6. Outstanding contribution under the category “Outstanding Nal Jal Mitra/Rural Water Supply Operator”

Dawngtu -Pu K. Chondro, Belthei, Lunglei District

Category tina pakhatna theuhte hi Certificate leh Cash incentive hlan an ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT DISASTER MANAGEMENT COMMITTEE THUTKHAWM NEIH A NI
content:
4958/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, the 23rd March, 2026 :Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 AM khan DC's Conference Hall, Lawngtlai ah Pu Donny Lalruatsanga, Bawrhsap leh Chairman, District Disaster Management Authority ni bawk kaihhruainain Lawngtlai District Disaster Management Committee thutkhawmna neih a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Sik leh sa hi a mumal tawh lo a, kumtin hian hrilh lawk a har em em a, kumin ah engtiang in ngei ruahtui kan dawn dawn hriat a ni lo a, in hmakhua a ngai a ni, a ti. A pawimawh ber leh a hnar kai tu ber VC, CYLA, Branch YLA leh NGOs dangte mawh min lak sak tu kan kut ke te an ni tiin, thawhhona tha nen eng chhiatna thlengah pawh hmachhawn ho a tul a, a bik takin SDRS 3rd IR - te an awm hi a vanneih thlak hle a ni a ti bawk.Chhiatna lian lei min tam tak a thleng thei reng a ni tiin, State Sorkar department hrang hrang, LADC lam leh NGOs- te inkarah thawhhona tha a awm zel a beisei tih a sawi. Bawrhsap chuan fur lo thleng tur atana inbuatsaihna tha a pawimawh tih tarlangin, DDMA chuan theihtawp a chhuah zel tur thu a tarlang bawk.

Vawiin thutkhawm ah hian Line Department-PWD, PHE, P&E, CMO leh DRDO ten chhiat tawh a hmanrua hman theih tur an neih te report pek a ni a, detail report hi District Disaster Management Authority ah thehluh nise tih a ni a. Zonal Officers/Incident Commanders - te ruat thar nise tih a ni a, District Emergency Operation Center (24 x7) buatsaih fel a ni thu report a ni bawk. VCs leh NGOs ten Chhiatrupna Prompt Report DDMA ah report vat thin ni se tih a ni a, In luah ngam tawh loh Chhiatna thlen mai thei awm te report ni se tih niin tun dinhmunah Pu H Lalnghakzuala In, Council Veng a mi chu thiat nise tih a ni. BDOs leh Zonal Officers ten an area chhunga chhiatna thlen hlauhawm thei turte endik nise an ti a, Tui luanna felfai lo chu chhiatna thlenna chhan tam ber a nih thu sawiin, khawchhung side drain leh bawlhlawh paih endik chu March thla chhungah neih se tih a ni a. Tul leh pawimawhah District Disaster lam atangin thuchhuah neih ni se tih a ni. QRT - Training buatsaih nise, Department tinin Disaster Management Plan, School Safety Plan, Emergency Plan neih nise tih niin, a tam thei ang bera 'awareness' inpek ni se an ti bawk.

Bawrhsap chuan chiatna thlengah leh invenna kawngah hawhhona tha nei tura  kalkhawmte sawmin,  lawmthu sawina neiin thutkhawm hi a khar a ni.

title: Kolasib Forest Division-in International Day of Forests an hmang
content:
4957/2025-2026

Kolasib, March 23, 2026:March ni 21, 2026 khan Kolasib Forest Division chuan an hnuaia Forest Range pakua (9) theuh ah te 'International Day of Forests' an hmang.

He ni hman chhan ber hi mipuite zingah ramngaw pawimawhzia thehdarh leh, a chhawmdawl leh humhalh zawnga nun phung inzirtir a ni a. Village Council, Biodiversity Management Committee, school naupang leh tualchhung mipuite huapin inzirtirna (awareness programme) hrang hrang neih a ni. He ni hmanna hmun hrang hrang ahte hian sik leh sa inthlak leh nungcha leh thlai chi hrang hrang humhalhnaah leh eizawnna atana ramngaw tangkaina leh pawimawhzia te uar taka tarlan a ni.

He ni pual hian hmun hrang hrangah Farmers' Association te nena tangkawpin hnim sam fai leh thing phun hnatlang neih a ni a. Heng hmalaknate hi ramngaw hriselna chawikang tur leh, ramngaw siamtha leh tura mipuite tel ve theihna tura buatsaih a ni.

He hunah hian ramngaw  humhalh leh enkawl hnaa thawkrimtute inpekna hriatpuina atan field-a hna thawk (uniform nei lo) staff-te hnenah hnathawhna thuamhnaw (field dress) sem a ni bawk.

Attachment
